title: Opening for Software Engineer at BigBasket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
